feeds.title: Civic News
feeds.note: No RSS/Atom feed resolved (all common feed paths returned 404). Posts scraped from the JS-rendered /news listing; blog URLs live under /news/. Per-post publish dates and summaries pulled from each post page's datePublished and og:description. 2026-07-04 run: page is client-rendered, no dates recoverable via WebFetch/curl this pass.
